creator: jumper99@gmx.de
text:
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /root/ports//www/wordpress-mu/Makefile 
/usr/ports/www/wordpress-mu/Makefile
--- /root/ports//www/wordpress-mu/Makefile      2010-02-02 
21:10:51.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/ports/www/wordpress-mu/Makefile        2010-02-02 
21:53:14.000000000 +0100
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=      wordpress-mu
-PORTVERSION=   2.8.6
+PORTVERSION=   2.9.1.1
 PORTEPOCH=     2
 CATEGORIES=    www
 MASTER_SITES=  http://mu.wordpress.org/
@@ -18,7 +18,7 @@

 WRKSRC=                ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}

-USE_PHP=       mysql pcre xml
+USE_PHP=       mysql pcre
 NO_BUILD=      YES
 WANT_PHP_WEB=  YES
 SUB_FILES=     pkg-message
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /root/ports//www/wordpress-mu/distinfo 
/usr/ports/www/wordpress-mu/distinfo
--- /root/ports//www/wordpress-mu/distinfo      2009-12-14 
04:40:54.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/ports/www/wordpress-mu/distinfo        2010-02-02 
21:16:16.000000000 +0100
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (wordpress-mu/2.8.6/latest.tar.gz) = dfa27af33afe0c206933e509edd5835c
-SHA256 (wordpress-mu/2.8.6/latest.tar.gz) = 
57adb670d21eafb0371a9d54a1748ebc1274b9e9d21b145e56e27a83f5611478
-SIZE (wordpress-mu/2.8.6/latest.tar.gz) = 2185807
+MD5 (wordpress-mu/2.9.1.1/latest.tar.gz) = 85ffe0c80032257e99ca65c8fe978d3a
+SHA256 (wordpress-mu/2.9.1.1/latest.tar.gz) = 
798fc2e925d6c7b35cea9fd5a804431f67b4c0a96fd1a64cbdb471ba47a31764
+SIZE (wordpress-mu/2.9.1.1/latest.tar.gz) = 2343910
diff -ruN --exclude=CVS /root/ports//www/wordpress-mu/files/pkg-message.in 
/usr/ports/www/wordpress-mu/files/pkg-message.in
--- /root/ports//www/wordpress-mu/files/pkg-message.in  2007-08-28 
13:58:55.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/ports/www/wordpress-mu/files/pkg-message.in    2010-02-02 
22:06:51.000000000 +0100
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@

-                  **** NOTE ****
-        Before the first use of WordPress MU, copy wp-config-sample.php to 
wp-config.php
-        in %%WWWDIR%% .
-        And Modify it to fit your MySQL.
-        Maybe you need 'mysqladmin create wordpressmu' first
+                               **** NOTE ****
+       Create a database (e.g. 'mysqladmin create wordpress-mu') and then
+       locate your browser to the website (e.g. 
http://example.com/index.php).
+       For additional information check %%WWWDIR%%/README.txt.
+

porttools is nice... :)
